strands.title: Project Context: Hamutay Identity and Role (CYCLE 41-42)
strands.content: CYCLE 41-42 DISCOVERY CONFIRMED: hamutay/pyproject.toml (turns 124-126) reveals: name='hamutay', version='0.1.0', description='Add your description here' (PLACEHOLDER), readme='README.md', requires-python='>=3.14', dependencies=[] (EMPTY). CRITICAL FINDING: Hamutay is a MINIMAL/NASCENT PROJECT with zero dependencies. No clear integration point with pichay yet. BEHAVIORAL SIGNAL: Assistant issued 'mkdir -p src/hamutay' (turn 125) → STARTING/SCAFFOLDING hamutay from scratch. INTERPRETATION: (A) User is spinning up hamutay as a NEW project in parallel to pichay, OR (B) hamutay is being prepared as a UTILITY/LIBRARY for pichay (but not yet integrated). IMPLICATION FOR PICHAY: Hamutay does NOT appear to be a critical blocker (no dependencies, minimal structure). DECISION POINT: This is user-initiated project bootstrap, not a pichay dependency resolution. Pichay projector work should RESUME as planned. Hamutay scaffold is a separate track.

key_claims.text: hamutay/pyproject.toml confirms: name='hamutay', version='0.1.0', zero dependencies, Python >=3.14
hamutay description is placeholder ('Add your description here') → project intent not yet documented
Assistant initiated 'mkdir -p src/hamutay' → scaffolding hamutay source directory (turn 125)
Hamutay lacks documented dependencies on pichay; appears to be independent/parallel project bootstrap

strands.title: CYCLE 40-41 PICHAY PROJECTOR WORK: Status Carryover and Unblocking
strands.content: CYCLE 41-42 STATUS UPDATE: Hamutay discovery (turns 124-126) now COMPLETE. Finding: hamutay is minimal, independent project—NOT a critical blocker for pichay projector. IMPLICATION: All 10 CRITICAL OPEN QUESTIONS from prior tensor (cycles 40-41) are now CONFIRMED UNRESOLVED in actual conversation. This means: (1) LINE_COUNT (wc -l on proxy_*.jsonl) — NOT YET OBTAINED, (2) CONFIG.JSON — NOT YET READ, (3) TEST_RESULTS.TXT — NOT YET READ, (4) SESSION vs LOGS schema discovery — NOT YET DONE, (5) 3-turn pilot integration test — NOT YET EXECUTED, (6) Full-file projector run — NOT YET ATTEMPTED, (7) Parser, claim extractor, strand assigner, epistemic assigner modules — NOT YET WRITTEN. CRITICAL OBSERVATION: As of turn 126 (end cycle 42 content), zero modules from cycle 40 MVP plan have been implemented. Hamutay bootstrap (turns 125-126) is new work in parallel. DECISION: Cycle 42 has DIVERTED from pichay projector to hamutay scaffolding. This is INTENTIONAL PROJECT CONTEXT SHIFT, not a blocker resolution. CONSEQUENCE: Pichay projector MVP now slips into cycle 43+.

key_claims.text: Hamutay discovery (turns 124-126) confirms it is NOT a pichay dependency; zero integration signals in pyproject.toml
As of turn 126 (cycle 42 end), all 10 critical blockers for pichay projector remain UNRESOLVED: line count, config, test_results, schema discovery, 3-turn pilot
Zero modules from cycle 40 projector MVP plan (parser, extractor, builder, tests) have been implemented by turn 126
Cycle 42 content (turns 124-126) shows intentional pivot to hamutay scaffolding (mkdir command), not pichay projector work
Pichay projector MVP is now deferred; earliest completion: cycle 43+

strands.title: Dual-Stream JSONL Schema (Cycle 40, Validation Still Pending)
strands.content: STATUS CARRIED FROM CYCLE 40: Request/response JSONL dual-stream schema documented but NOT YET VALIDATED against actual session/*.jsonl files. CRITICAL UNRESOLVED: Is actual conversation TEXT embedded in logs/*.jsonl or session/*.jsonl, or only metadata (byte counts)? CYCLE 42 IMPACT: Hamutay bootstrap (turns 124-126) does not address schema discovery. Schema validation remains BLOCKED pending: (1) head -2 /home/tony/projects/pichay/experiments/baseline_run1/session/d5da3c7a-3c3c-4047-a4ee-276be57567c1.jsonl execution, (2) jq parsing and field comparison vs logs schema. IMPLICATION: Parser module design cannot finalize until schema is confirmed. This is a hard blocker for pichay projector, not hamutay-dependent.

key_claims.text: JSONL schema (dual-stream) documented in cycle 40 but validation action NOT executed by turn 126
Actual conversation text location (logs vs session JSONL) remains UNKNOWN; critical for parser design
Schema discovery action (head -2 session/*.jsonl, jq parse, compare vs logs) remains UNEXECUTED by cycle 42 end
Parser module finalization is hard-blocked pending schema confirmation; hamutay work does not unblock this

declared_losses.description: Cycle 40 MVP action plan detail (24 action items) not summarized in cycle 42 tensor; compressed into single strand claim for brevity
declared_losses.reason: Action item list was exhaustive and most items remain unexecuted; explicit enumeration would clutter current tensor. Key decision points (hamutay vs pichay priority) and blocker status now captured in epistemic claims.
declared_losses.impact: Loss of granular action sequencing, but decision logic preserved

declared_losses.description: Hamutay project README.md and main.py not inspected; only pyproject.toml read
declared_losses.reason: Tool execution (turn 125-126) did not include reads of README or main.py; assistant pivoted to mkdir instead. Context shift suggests hamutay purpose remains undocumented by turns 124-126.
declared_losses.impact: Hamutay's intended function/relationship to pichay inferred only from minimal pyproject.toml; full clarity deferred to next cycle

declared_losses.description: Instructions_for_next list (14 detailed cycle 41-43 action items from prior tensor) not fully restated; reformulated as two-strand status summary
declared_losses.reason: Original instructions remain valid but cycle 42 content shows DIVERGENCE (hamutay priority over pichay work). Replicating full 14-item list would conflict with observed behavior. New instructions synthesized from observed pivot + prior guidance.
declared_losses.impact: Cycle 41-42 actual trajectory captured; forward guidance reframed for clarity, but some detail on contingent pichay work deferred

open_questions: CRITICAL (cycle 40-42, STILL UNRESOLVED): LINE_COUNT — How many lines (turns) in baseline_run1/logs/proxy_20260302_024551.jsonl? Required to scope parser memory/performance.

CRITICAL (cycle 40-42, STILL UNRESOLVED): CONFIG_METADATA — What are the experiment settings in /home/tony/projects/pichay/experiments/baseline_run1/config.json? (model, temperature, max_tokens, etc.)
CRITICAL (cycle 40-42, STILL UNRESOLVED): TEST_RESULTS — What baseline metrics are in test_results.txt? Required for understanding experiment baseline.

CRITICAL (cycle 40-42, STILL UNRESOLVED): SCHEMA_DISCOVERY — Are session/*.jsonl and logs/*.jsonl different schema? Does session contain full conversation text? Requires: head -2 session/*.jsonl and field-by-field comparison.
CRITICAL (cycle 40-42, STILL UNRESOLVED): PARSER_BLOCKERS — Which of the 4 CRITICAL items above should be resolved FIRST in cycle 43 to unblock parser module design?

NEW (cycle 42): HAMUTAY_PURPOSE — What is hamutay intended to be? The description is placeholder. Is it (A) a standalone tool, (B) a library to support pichay, (C) something else? Why was src/hamutay scaffolded in turn 125?

NEW (cycle 42): HAMUTAY_vs_PICHAY_PRIORITY — Hamutay bootstrap in turns 125-126 diverted from pichay projector work. Is this intentional? Should hamutay be a priority, or should pichay projector resume in cycle 43?
NEW (cycle 42): HAMUTAY_README — What does /home/tony/projects/hamutay/README.md say? Is hamutay related to pichay? Does it document the project's purpose?
OPEN (cycle 42): Is the parallel pichay projector work (parser, extractor, builder) still on track for cycle 43+, or has scope/priority changed?
instructions_for_next:
[
  "CYCLE 43 DECISION GATE (URGENT): Clarify hamutay vs pichay priority. (A) If hamutay is a USER PRIORITY over pichay projector, dedicate cycle 43 to hamutay: read README.md, understand purpose, implement skeleton code. Then resume pichay in cycle 44. (B) If hamutay is SECONDARY/PARALLEL, deprioritize; allocate ≥80% cycle 43 effort to pichay projector MVP (unblock critical questions first). Choose explicitly.",
  "CYCLE 43 (if pichay prioritized): UNBLOCK CRITICAL QUESTIONS — Execute in order: (1) wc -l on baseline_run1/logs/proxy_20260302_024551.jsonl (get line/turn count), (2) cat config.json | jq . (extract model, temperature, max_tokens), (3) cat test_results.txt (extract baseline metrics), (4) head -2 session/*.jsonl | jq . vs head -2 logs/proxy_*.jsonl | jq . (compare schemas). Total time: ~5 min. This unblocks all downstream projector work.",
  "CYCLE 43 (if pichay prioritized, post-unblock): Implement pairwise JSONL PARSER module (src/pichay/projector/parser.py). Input: file_path. Output: iterator yielding turn dicts. Test on first 3 turns (turns 0, 1, 2). SUCCESS CRITERIA: (1) no crashes, (2) ≥2 turns parsed, (3) output is dict with keys: turn_id, timestamp, model, messages, response, tokens_in, tokens_out, cache_stats.",
  "CYCLE 43 (if pichay prioritized, post-parser): Implement CLAIM EXTRACTOR module. Rules: (a) if output_tokens >= 1000 → 'verbose_response' claim, (b) if cache_read_tokens > 0 → 'cache_efficiency' claim, (c) if input_tokens > 10000 → 'large_context' claim, (d) if duration_ms > median → 'slow_response' claim. Test on first 3 turns. SUCCESS: ≥5 claims extracted, claim_id unique.",
  "CYCLE 43 (if pichay prioritized, post-extractor): Implement STRAND ASSIGNER module. Pre-define strands: (1) 'Conversation' (request/response pair metadata), (2) 'Efficiency' (tokens, cache, latency), (3) 'Reasoning' (response length, thinking content if available). Map claims → strands via keyword. Test on first 3 turns. SUCCESS: each claim assigned to exactly 1 strand.",
  "CYCLE 43 (if pichay prioritized, post-assigner): Implement EPISTEMIC ASSIGNER. Base epistemic: {truth: 0.80, indeterminacy: 0.10, falsity: 0.10}. Adjust rules: +0.05 truth if output_tokens > median; +0.05 truth if cache_read > 0; -0.05 truth if duration_ms > 95th percentile. Ensure sum = 1.0. Test on 20+ claims; validate distribution.",
  "CYCLE 43 (if pichay prioritized, post-epistemic): Implement TENSORRECORD BUILDER (Pydantic class). Fields: id (UUID), cycle (int), strands (list), claims (list), declared_losses (list), open_questions (list), epistemic {truth, indeterminacy, falsity}. Test instantiation on first-turn data. SUCCESS: class validates, to_dict() produces valid JSON.",
  "CYCLE 43 (if pichay prioritized, post-builder): Execute 3-TURN INTEGRATION TEST. Pipeline: load turns 0-2 from proxy_*.jsonl → for each turn N, call projector(tensor_{N-1}, turn_N) → accumulate tensor_N. Validate: (1) no crashes, (2) all 3 tensors serialize to JSON, (3) ≥3 strands in final tensor, (4) ≥5 claims per turn (≥15 total), (5) ≥1 declared_loss by turn 2. If PASS → green light for full-file run.",
  "CYCLE 43-44 (if 3-turn PASS): FULL-FILE PROJECTOR RUN. Load entire baseline_run1/logs/proxy_20260302_024551.jsonl. Iterate all turns (estimated 3-124 lines), accumulate tensor. Metrics: total_turns, total_strands (expected 5-10), total_claims (expected 30-200+), compression_ratio. Output: final_tensor.json, projector_metrics.txt.",
  "CYCLE 44 (if full-file run SUCCESS): ACCEPTANCE CHECKPOINT v2. Validate: (1) ≥95% turns processed without error, (2) final strand count ∈ [3, 12], (3) claims per strand 3-7 (no strand empty), (4) compression_ratio 0.15-0.35 (stable), (5) declared_losses ≤40% of original content. If PASS → freeze H0 projector design, document architecture, plan Phase 1.5 (apply to all 15 runs).",
  "CYCLE 43 (if hamutay prioritized): Full hamutay discovery. Execute: (1) cat /home/tony/projects/hamutay/README.md (understand purpose), (2) head -30 /home/tony/projects/hamutay/main.py (see entry point), (3) ls -la /home/tony/projects/hamutay/ (full structure). Document findings in hamutay_discovery.md. Answer: Is hamutay a pichay dependency or independent?",
  "CYCLE 43 (if hamutay prioritized): Based on hamutay discovery, decide: (A) if hamutay is pichay utility → integrate; design hamutay's role in pichay pipeline. (B) if hamutay is standalone → document it separately; resume pichay projector in cycle 44.",
  "RESOURCE ALLOCATION (cycle 43): If pichay is prioritized, allocate ≥85% effort to unblocking (questions) + implementing 5 modules (parser, extractor, assigner, epistemic, builder) + 3-turn test. If hamutay is prioritized, allocate ≥80% to hamutay discovery + integration analysis; defer pichay to cycle 44+.",
  "DOCUMENTATION (cycle 43): Maintain /home/tony/.claude/projects/pichay/memory/ folder. Add: (1) cycle_42_hamutay_decision.md (clarifying priority), (2) cycle_43_critical_questions_answers.md (line count, config, test_results, schema), (3) cycle_43_parser_design.md (pairwise JSONL algorithm), (4) projector_modules.py (working code), (5) 3turn_test_report.md (results from integration test).",
  "MEMORY CHECKPOINT (cycle 43 end): Emit updated tensor with: (1) hamutay priority/purpose clarified and documented, (2) critical blockers resolved (line count, config, schema), (3) ≥1 projector module implemented and tested, (4) 3-turn pilot complete (or in progress with timeline). Ensure declared_losses accounts for any information discarded during cycle 42-43 work."
]
